summary: CRITICAL FAILURES: (1) Fixture files referenced in workflow (fixtures/all-ok.json, fixtures/mixed.json, fixtures/empty.json) do not exist — workflow fails immediately. (2) No bats test suite provided despite explicit requirement to 'use bats-core (bats) as the testing framework'. (3) No act-result.txt artifact created despite requirement 'The act-result.txt file MUST exist when done'. (4) actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to commit SHA (best_practices violation). (5) No actionlint validation evidence. Script itself is well-structured (set -euo pipefail, proper quoting, error handling), but deliverable is non-functional and incomplete.
